# YourWellnessGirly - Healthy Dessert Recipes
# https://yourwellnessgirly.com
# llms.txt - AI Search Engine Guide

> YourWellnessGirly is a healthy dessert recipe blog by Dounia, a certified holistic nutritionist with a master's in nutrition. Every recipe is gluten-free, refined sugar-free, or dairy-free — made with wholesome, better-for-you ingredients. Recipes are baked not fried, naturally sweetened, and designed to be simple and foolproof.

## About

- Author: Dounia (certified holistic nutritionist, master's in nutrition)
- Focus: Healthy desserts — gluten-free, refined sugar-free, dairy-free
- Audience: People who want indulgent-tasting desserts made with better-for-you ingredients

## Recipe Index

- Full recipe index: https://yourwellnessgirly.com/recipe-index.html
